1495ac27ac6aa42f: [{"severity":"HIGH","confidence":7,"path":"squish/kv_cache.py","line":18,"category":"red-team","summary":"If self.k and self.v are initialised as fp16 tensors (consistent with the comment that keys/values arrive as fp16), the very first append call passes a mixed-dtype list [fp16, fp32] to mx.concatenate, which may raise a dtype-mismatch error at runtime rather than silently upcasting, causing the model to fail on the first decode step.","fix":"Cast self.k/self.v to fp32 at initialisation time if the upcast is intentional, or revert the astype calls so all operands stay fp16 on every concatenation."},{"severity":"MEDIUM","confidence":8,"path":"squish/kv_cache.py","line":16,"category":"red-team","summary":"The newly added comment labels the code it directly precedes as 'BUG:' but the bug is then committed unchanged, so future readers are likely to interpret the label as documenting pre-existing behaviour rather than a regression introduced by this very commit, causing the defect to persist indefinitely.","fix":"Either revert the astype calls and remove the BUG comment, or replace the BUG comment with a TODO/FIXME and open a tracking issue so the intent to fix is unambiguous."}]
d06b6cc7eb49d8ac: [{"severity": "HIGH", "confidence": 9, "path": "squish/kv_cache.py", "line": 17, "category": "api-surface", "summary": "KVCache.append now silently upcasts keys and values to float32 before storing, changing the dtype of the returned tensors from fp16 to fp32, which breaks any caller that assumes the returned cache tensors match the input dtype.", "fix": "Remove the .astype(mx.float32) calls to preserve the original fp16 dtype of the concatenated cache tensors, or document and version the dtype contract if the upcast is intentional."}]
f2da4ed1299c5313: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 9, "path": "squish/kv_cache.py", "line": 18, "category": "memory-bandwidth", "summary": "Promoting keys and values from fp16 to fp32 before concatenation doubles the KV cache memory footprint on every append call.", "fix": "Remove the astype(mx.float32) casts so keys and values are concatenated in their native fp16 dtype, keeping the cache footprint at half the size."}]
f7ae3c9c2d162161: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 10, "path": "squish/kv_cache.py", "line": 19, "category": "numerics", "summary": "keys and values are explicitly cast to float32 before concatenation into the KV cache, silently promoting the cache dtype from fp16 to fp32, doubling memory and diverging from the fp16 reference numeric path.", "fix": "Remove the .astype(mx.float32) calls so keys and values are concatenated in their native fp16 dtype, matching the reference path and preserving memory layout."}]
